scope: Fix Real Backend Test start and metrics gaps for k6-backed Work/Study public target load testing.
changed: Frontend real backend start payload now includes editable Work/Study target URLs.
Backend real load test contracts now include targets, latency breakdown, and per-target metrics.
Fake runner now cycles targets and produces target metrics.
Supported runner list is limited to k6 and fake.
Backend Docker runtime includes k6 from grafana/k6:1.0.0.
Dev compose points backend k6 base URL at http://nginx.
Nginx API locations emit request/upstream timing headers where available.
Dashboard renders real target URLs, per-target summaries, and source-aware component timing.
Real backend start/stop UI mutations use the shared CSRF helper.
intentionallyNotChanged: No forced nginx upstream timing when nginx does not provide a parseable value.
No unrelated dirty worktree changes reverted.

validations.result: succeeded with existing AWSSDK.Core NU1901 warnings
passed with existing warnings outside task scope

validations.command: BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 NGINX_HTTPS_PORT=3002 docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build backend frontend nginx
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend k6 version

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 ENABLE_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=true PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=visible PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PROFILE=core npx playwright test tests/admin-load-test-dashboard.spec.ts --workers=1

validations.result: HTTP 200 start, completed, totalRequests=402, failedRequests=0, p95Ms=5.5, p99Ms=5.5, appElapsedP95Ms=5.2, nginxRequestTimeP95Ms=6, two Study targets with 201 requests each

validations.command: actual UI click smoke public-api-spike/public-blogs-only/k6/10/30/10 after CSRF helper fix
validations.result: HTTP 200 start and Study list/read target metrics rendered instead of Run ID not started
passed after CSRF helper fix with existing unrelated warnings

risks: LoadTesting__BaseUrl must be configured correctly outside dev compose.
Cold Docker builds need access to grafana/k6:1.0.0.
Current k6 runner ingests completion summary rather than streaming in-run metrics.
recommendation: Use the fixed Real Backend Test path; treat DB timing and streaming k6 progress as separate follow-ups if required.
